_description: Border style definitions for Thai indigenous textile patterns. Each style includes rendering instructions and cultural context.

woven.description: Traditional woven border, created on the loom during weaving

solid.name: Solid Woven Border
solid.description: Continuous band of uniform color woven at the edge
solid.rendering: Fill edge pixels with solid color band

double.name: Double Woven Border
double.description: Two parallel woven bands with a gap, simulating double-hem technique
double.rendering: Two thin lines separated by 2-4 pixel gap

striped.name: Striped Woven Border
striped.description: Multi-colored horizontal stripes at the border edge
striped.rendering: Alternating color bands of 2-4 pixels each

embroidered.description: Embroidered border added after base weaving, using needle and thread

zigzag.name: Zigzag Embroidered Border
zigzag.description: Sawtooth/zigzag pattern created with running stitch
zigzag.rendering: Alternating diagonal lines creating sawtooth edge

cross_stitch.name: Cross-Stitch Border
cross_stitch.description: X-shaped stitch pattern along the edge
cross_stitch.rendering: Alternating diagonal stitches forming X pattern

chain_stitch.name: Chain Stitch Border
chain_stitch.description: Looping chain-like stitch along the edge

counted_thread.name: Counted Thread Border
counted_thread.description: Geometric pattern created by counting warp/weft threads
counted_thread.rendering: Grid-based geometric pattern aligned to pixel grid

printed.description: Border applied through printing, dyeing, or painting techniques

batik.name: Batik Border
batik.description: Wax-resist dyed border with organic edges
batik.rendering: Solid color band with slightly irregular edge (wax crackle effect)

ikat_edge.name: Ikat Edge Border
ikat_edge.description: Blurred, feathered edge characteristic of ikat dyeing
ikat_edge.rendering: Color band with gradient/feathered transition at inner edge

block_print.name: Block Print Border
block_print.description: Stamped geometric pattern using carved blocks
block_print.rendering: Repeating geometric stamp pattern along edge

tie_dye.name: Tie-Dye Border
tie_dye.description: Resist-dyed border with characteristic circular patterns
tie_dye.rendering: Concentric circle patterns with resist white spots
